scripts.build: cargo build -p route-engine && npm run build:sdk-package && node --test packages/*/test/*.test.mjs
scripts.deploy:testnet: forge build --root contracts/polkadot-hub-router && XROUTE_DEPLOYMENT_PROFILE=testnet node scripts/deploy-stack.mjs
scripts.deploy:mainnet: forge build --root contracts/polkadot-hub-router && XROUTE_DEPLOYMENT_PROFILE=mainnet node scripts/deploy-stack.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:rust && npm run test:solidity && npm run test:node && npm run test:package
